mapper.sql: SELECT ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_PRD_ATTENDANCE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_PRD_ATTENDANCE( ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workDate}, #{classCode}, #{className}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_PRD_ATTENDANCE SET UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select ID,ATTENDANCE_ID,USER_ID,USER_NAME,COEFFICIENT,ISWORK from T_PRD_ATTENDANCE_USER where USER_ID IN
#{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT u.ID, u.USER_ACCOUNT, u.USER_NAME, u.DEPT_ID, u.IS_SUPERADMIN, DECODE(u.IS_SUPERADMIN, '1', '是', '否') IS_SUPERADMIN_LABEL, u.MOBILE, u.EMAIL, u.STATUS, u.REMARK, DECODE(u.STATUS, '1', '在用', '停用') STATUS_LABEL, u.PSD_UPD_DATE, u.SORT_NUM, u.UPDATE_TIME, u.CREATE_TIME, u.POST_CODE, u.POST_NAME, u.UNIT_TYPE_CODE, u.UNIT_TYPE_NAME, d.DEPT_NAME FROM SYS_USER u JOIN SYS_DEPT d ON u.DEPT_ID = d.ID AND d.ID IN ( SELECT ID FROM ( SELECT ID,DEPT_LEVEL,DEPT_NAME FROM SYS_DEPT START WITH ID = ( SELECT ID FROM ( SELECT ID,DEPT_LEVEL,DEPT_NAME FROM SYS_DEPT START WITH ID =(SELECT ID FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE ID = ( SELECT DEPT_ID FROM sys_user WHERE ID = #{userId,jdbcTypeName=BIGINT} ) ) CONNECT BY PRIOR PARENT_ID = ID )WHERE DEPT_LEVEL = '2') CONNECT BY PRIOR ID = PARENT_ID ) WHERE DEPT_LEVEL IN (3,4) ) where u.STATUS = '1'
select * from SYS_DEPT where PARENT_IDS like concat(concat('%', #{companyId}), '%') or PARENT_ID = #{companyId}

SELECT t1.id, t1.DEPT_NAME AS deptName FROM SYS_DEPT t1 LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT t ON t1.PARENT_ID = t.id AND t.DEPT_LEVEL = 1 WHERE (t1.DEPT_LEVEL = 3 OR t1.DEPT_LEVEL = 4) AND t.STATUS = '1' AND t1.STATUS = '1'
AND t1.PARENT_IDS like concat(concat('%', #{companyId}), '%') or t.PARENT_ID = #{companyId}

SELECT t2.id, t2.DEPT_NAME AS deptName FROM SYS_DEPT t2 LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT t1 ON t2.PARENT_ID = t1.id AND t1.DEPT_LEVEL = 2 LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT t ON t1.PARENT_ID = t.id AND t.DEPT_LEVEL = 1 WHERE (t2.DEPT_LEVEL = 3 OR t2.DEPT_LEVEL = 4) AND t.STATUS = '1' AND t1.STATUS = '1' AND t2.STATUS = '1'
AND t2.PARENT_IDS like concat(concat('%', #{companyId}), '%') or t1.PARENT_ID = #{companyId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ID,DEPT_NAME,DEPT_LEVEL FROM SYS_DEPT START WITH ID =(SELECT ID FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE ID = ( SELECT DEPT_ID FROM sys_user WHERE ID = #{userId,jdbcTypeName=BIGINT} )) CONNECT BY PRIOR ID=PARENT_ID )WHERE DEPT_LEVEL IN (3,4)

SELECT ID,DEPT_NAME,DEPT_LEVEL FROM SYS_DEPT START WITH ID = (SELECT ID FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE ID = ( SELECT DEPT_ID FROM sys_user WHERE ID = #{userId,jdbcTypeName=BIGINT})) CONNECT BY PRIOR PARENT_ID=ID
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ID,DEPT_NAME,DEPT_LEVEL FROM SYS_DEPT START WITH ID = (SELECT ID FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) CONNECT BY PRIOR PARENT_ID=ID) WHERE DEPT_LEVEL = '2'
SELECT SU.USER_NAME,SU.ID FROM SYS_ROLE C left join SYS_ROLE_USER SRU on C.id = SRU.ROLE_ID left JOIN SYS_USER SU on SU.ID = SRU.USER_ID WHERE C.ROLE_CODE = 'CQDMZBZR' and SU.STATUS = '1'
